headline: Is COO Stock Attractive as MyDay Gains Meet Asia-Pacific Pressure
summary: COO's MyDay, MiSight and fertility strengths support the long-term case, but Asia-Pacific softness, recall costs and leverage keep the stock in wait-and-see mode.
